creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Last 2 weeks of DSS! How many fun activities have you done this season?

Here are the ongoing events that you shouldn’t miss:

📍 Modhesh World in Dubai World Trade Centre
🎟️ Free entry
🗓️ Until August 27, 2023

📍 DSS SHARE Millionaire draw in Mall of the Emirates, City Centre Mirdif, City Centre Deira, City Centre Me‘aisem & City Centre Al Shindagha!
💰 Spend 300 AED for a chance to win 1 million SHARE points
🗓️ Until September 3, 2023

📍 Summer Restaurant Week
🍽️ Special set menus in participating restaurants 
🗓️ Until August 27, 2023

Tag your family and friends!
